findings.blocker: MIS-SPECIFIED / provably FALSE as written (decision-changing finding, independently confirmed airtight by lean-auditor AND lvb-csi). The consumer (CechAugmentedResolution.hSec) needs the AUGMENTED complex D (D.X 0 = Γ(V,F)); Stubs 5/6 are stated for the NON-augmented sectionCechComplex D' (D'.X 0 = ∏_i Fp(U_i∩V)). D≅D' is false; D' is not contractible (one-member cover {V} gives H⁰(D')=Fp(V)≠0). Root cause is a BLUEPRINT internal inconsistency between def:cech_augmented_complex and lem:cechSection_complex_iso.
